help_menu: рҹҘ° Click the buttons below to get information about my commands. Note: All commands can be used with /
help_admins: рҹ”” Admin commands: /pause: рҹҳҪ Pause stream. /resume: рҹҡҖ Resume stream. /skip: рҹ“ў Skip stream. /stop: рҹӣЎ Stop stream. /seek [seconds]: вҡЎпёҸ Forward seek. /reload: рҹҳөвҖҚрҹ’« Reload admin cache.

help_ping: вҡЎпёҸ Ping commands: /ping: вҡЎпёҸ Check bot status. /start: вҳҖпёҸ Start the bot.
help_play: рҹҺ¶ Play commands: /play: рҹҺ¶ Play music. /vplay: рҹҺҡ Play music video. -f: вң”пёҸ Force play. -v: рҹӨ© Video mode.

help_sudo: рҹҘ· Sudo commands: /ac: рҹ‘Ө Active calls. /broadcast: рҹ“ў Broadcast message. /eval: рҹ’Ҙ Execute code. /restart: рҹҡҖ Restart bot. /addsudo: рҹ‘‘ Add sudo user.
